description: Style NoteSport this white cap designed by adidas with climalite technology. Stay cool while it heats up, with the old school Adidas tri stripes, beat the scorching sun and at the same time make a style statement that is defined by this brilliant cap!Product DetailsEmbroidered eyelets on the crown, 'Adidas' text printed on the front and Adidas patented 3-Stripes appliquéd on the visor partly on crown, with an adjustable buckle back strap and CLIMALITE embroidered on back strapMaterial and Care100% polyesterHand wash cold waterDo not dry cleanLine dry
